steps.title: Use the damage clue
steps.content: The passage says deeper water can uproot young wild-rice plants during the floating leaf stage and destroy them. The blank must describe plants that are strongly affected by water depth.

steps.title: Test the meanings
steps.content: A contradicts the threat because immune plants would not be harmed. C does not mean affected by a condition. D means open or responsive in a general way, but it does not capture vulnerability to water depth. The answer is B.
